title: Tesla spins up robotaxi pilots in Orlando and Tampa ahead of Q2 earnings
summary: Tesla has brought an unspecified number of its unsupervised Model Y SUVs to Orlando and Tampa, just one day ahead of the company’s scheduled second-quarter earnings call. Musk offered more metered comments earlier this year on Tesla’s first-quarter call.
caption: output/2026-07-21/tesla-spins-up-robotaxi-pilots-in-orlando-and-tampa-ahead-of-q2-earnin.txt
